parameters.content:
## Workflow Overview: Watchlist Negative News Tracker

This workflow automates the monitoring of negative news for selected companies using search-based news retrieval. It fetches the latest articles, removes irrelevant entries and filters out previously processed items using unique IDs. Only new articles are analyzed using AI to detect negative sentiment and risk signals. The workflow then stores relevant data and sends alerts, enabling continuous monitoring, reduced manual effort and faster, insight-driven decision-making.

## How it works

The workflow fetches company names from Google Sheets. It then uses SerpAPI to get the latest news articles.
The articles are cleaned in a Code node by removing irrelevant entries and generating unique IDs. These are checked against Google Sheets to remove duplicates and only new articles are stored.
Next, an AI node analyzes each article to detect if the news is negative and assigns a reason and severity. Finally, only negative or high-risk news is filtered for further action (like alerts).

## Setup steps

**Read Watchlist**: Store and retrieve company names to monitor.
**Fetch News**: Use dynamic query like {{ $('Read Watchlist').item.json.Companies }} news to fetch articles.
**Results Aggregation**: Configured to "Aggregate All Item Data" to combine the search results of every company into a single array before cleaning starts.
**Filter Article List**: It extracts and maps news_results into an articles array by selecting only required fields.
**Process Articles**: Clean data, remove irrelevant entries and generate unique IDs for deduplication.
**Lookup Existing Articles**: Connect your sheet and use id for deduplication.
**Filter New Articles**: Allow only unseen articles to pass.
**Analyze News**: Configure model and enforce strict JSON output for company extraction and sentiment detection.
**Format & Enrich News Data**: The AI response is then structured and enriched using a Set node, combining model output with article data into a clean, standardized format.
**Filter Negative News** : Filter based on is_negative and optionally severity level.
**Append Processed News** : Store new articles with fields like Title, ID, Link, Date.
**Send Alert**: Format message (prefer HTML for email) and configure recipient details

parameters.text:
=You are a financial news analyst.
Analyze this news article:
Title: {{ $('Loop Over Articles').item.json.title }}
Task:
- Determine if the news is NEGATIVE
- Negative includes: layoffs, lawsuits, fraud, losses, decline, bans, investigations, risks

Return STRICT JSON:
{
  "company": "company_name",
  "is_negative": true/false,
  "reason": "short reason",
  "severity": "low | medium | high"
}

parameters.message:
=Negative News Alert

Company: {{ $json.Company }}

Title: {{ $('Loop Over Articles').item.json.title }}

Reason: {{ $json.Reason }}

Severity: {{ $json.Severity }}

Link: Read Article
parameters.subject: ={{ $json.Company }} Negative News

parameters.content:
## Data Source & Trigger
Fetch company watchlist from Google Sheets when workflow is triggered.

## News Fetching & Processing
Retrieve latest news via SerpAPI and aggregate results into a single dataset. Clean irrelevant entries, standardize fields and generate unique IDs. Cross-check with stored records to remove duplicates, allowing only new articles forward.

## AI Analysis & Alerting
Analyze each article using AI to detect negative sentiment, assign reason and severity. The AI response is then structured and enriched using a Set node, combining model output with article data into a clean, standardized format. Filter high-risk news, store results in Google Sheets and send formatted alerts for timely action and monitoring.

## Deduplication & Flow Control
Loop through processed articles and check against existing records in Google Sheets using unique IDs. Filter out duplicates, allowing only new articles to proceed, while controlling workflow timing and execution using conditional paths and wait logic.
